race.comment: FINED FOR SPEEDING (2) finds the maiden win elusive but it certainly hasn't been without trying. Has been savaging the line this prep and should be at his top now. Gets another great chance to break through. CASTRO (1) was never really in the hunt last time after drifting a long way back early but did warm nicely late. Has a decent record at this trip with four minor placings from five tries. If they can utilise the low draw this time, he can finally break through. BINDAREE LASS (9) strips fitter third-up and can sneak a minor spot with a touch of luck from the draw. LITLFELA (4) has had plenty of cracks to break through but there is efforts littered through his form that measure up. Keeping safe for a minor spot.
